title: Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Revenue Agency (CRA)
Administers tax, benefits, and related programs for the Government of Canada and for most provinces and territories.
- Payroll deductions calculator
- Ready to file your GST/HST return
- Benefits payment dates
- Forms and publications
- Skip the Line – Get faster help from the CRA

## Services and information
Personal, business, corporation, trust, and non-resident income tax, taxes for someone who died
How to send money to the CRA, receive your payments, options if you are unable to pay a debt

### Tax credits and benefits for individuals
Payment dates, eligibility for children, caregivers, people with disabilities, workers and others
GST/HST accounts, collect and remit the tax, file a return, claim rebates, search the GST/HST registry
Payroll accounts, deductions and contributions, information returns, and benefits and allowances

### Business registration
Get a business number (BN) or program accounts, find an existing BN, changes to a business

### Charities and giving
How to register and run a charity, charities listings, and charitable tax credits

### Savings and pension plans
Tax-free savings accounts, registered savings plans, pooled pension plans, and plan administration

### Excise and specialty taxes
Duties, customs, charges, tax on underused housing, luxury items, digital services revenue
Protect yourself against scams, how to report scams, identity theft, or tax cheating

### Support in difficult situations
Tariffs, situations of abuse or disaster, CRA debt, past COVID-19 relief

### Compliance and enforcement
Reporting obligations, debt collection, audits, taxpayer relief, objections or appeals
- Update your information
- Send service feedback
- Organizational structure
- Taxpayer Bill of Rights
- Security and privacy
- Submit accessibility feedback
- Facebook: CanRevAgency
- YouTube: CanRevAgency
- Instagram: CanRevAgency
- [First Facebook account title]
- [Second Facebook account title]

### The Honourable François-Philippe Champagne
Minister of Finance and National Revenue

### The Honourable Wayne Long
Secretary of State (Canada Revenue Agency and Financial Institutions)

## Parliamentary secretary
Parliamentary Secretary to the Minister of Finance and National Revenue and Parliamentary Secretary to the Secretary of State (Canada Revenue Agency and Financial Institutions)

## Taxpayers' Ombudsperson

### Office of the Taxpayers' Ombudsperson
- Canadians experience improved service delivery and responsiveness from the CRA this tax season 2026-05-07 03:49
- Canada Groceries and Essentials Benefit one-time top-up payment to make groceries and other essentials more affordable is coming June 5 2026-04-17 21:00
- The Minister of Finance and National Revenue and the Secretary of State (Canada Revenue Agency and Financial Institutions) mark the launch of the 2026 tax-filing season 2026-02-23 22:20
More: CRA news and tax tips

### Host a Free Tax Clinic
Register your organization to help individuals with a modest income access credits and benefits.
Here for your listening pleasure, and to help you understand taxes. Tune in today!
Hi! I am the Canada Revenue Agency's GenAI chatbot. Select the icon or press Ctrl+Shift+H to start a chat.
